summary: BookingDialog Guest Search Feature - All tests passed. Verified guest search functionality in PMS > Bookings > 'New Booking' dialog (BookingDialog.js) and confirmed CalendarDialogs.js NewBookingDialog still works correctly.
feature_tested: Guest search field in 'Yeni Rezervasyon Olustur' (Create New Booking) dialog with debounced search, dropdown results, guest selection badge, clear functionality, and Turkish labels

booking_dialog_pms.dialog_title: PASS - 'Yeni Rezervasyon Olustur' title is visible (Turkish)
booking_dialog_pms.dialog_description: PASS - 'Rezervasyon bilgilerini asagiya girin' subtitle visible
booking_dialog_pms.guest_search_input: PASS - data-testid='booking-dialog-guest-search' present with search icon
booking_dialog_pms.debounced_search: PASS - Typing 'ali' triggers API call after 300ms debounce
booking_dialog_pms.dropdown_results: PASS - data-testid='booking-dialog-guest-dropdown' shows 3 matching guests (Ali Veli, Ali Yilmaz, TEST_InvalidDates Guest)
booking_dialog_pms.guest_selection: PASS - Selecting guest shows blue badge with name and contact info (data-testid='booking-dialog-selected-guest')
booking_dialog_pms.clear_button: PASS - × button (data-testid='booking-dialog-clear-guest') clears selection and shows search input again
booking_dialog_pms.no_results_message: PASS - 'Sonuc bulunamadi. Yeni misafir kaydedin.' message appears for non-matching search

calendar_dialog_verification.dialog_opens: PASS - 'Hizli Rezervasyon' dialog opens from calendar page 'Rezervasyon ekle' button

booking_dialog.booking-dialog-selected-guest: PRESENT - Blue badge showing selected guest info

calendar_dialog.new-booking-guest-search: PRESENT - CalendarDialogs.js guest search (verified still working)

critical_code_review_comments: BookingDialog.js correctly implements guest search with debounce (300ms)
Selected guest shows in blue info card with name, email, phone, and stay count
Clear button properly resets state and shows search input again
No results message provides guidance to register new guest
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Turkish text localization is correctly applied to dialog title and labels
seed_data_creation: None - used existing guests (Ali Veli, Ali Yilmaz, TEST_InvalidDates Guest)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guest search feature in BookingDialog.js (PMS > Bookings > 'New Booking') is fully functional. Access path: /app/pms > Bookings tab > 'New Booking' button. Search for 'ali' returns 3 test guests. CalendarDialogs.js NewBookingDialog on /reservation-calendar also confirmed working with same guest search API.
